message:
fix(fuzz,xfstests): fix nightly fuzz dict flag placement and simplify parse_check_output

Nightly fuzz script (fuzz/scripts/nightly_fuzz.sh):
- Remove duplicate '--' separator from DICT_FLAG: the main cargo fuzz
  command already has '--' before libfuzzer args, so dict flags were
  getting a double separator causing parse errors
- Move $DICT_FLAG into the main argument list after -max_len so
  dictionary files are actually passed to libfuzzer

xfstests harness (crates/ffs-harness/src/xfstests.rs):
- Remove unnecessary BTreeSet allocation of selected_ids — the
  selected filter was redundant since cases are already constructed
  from the selected list; line matching alone suffices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,15 +46,16 @@ for target in "${TARGETS[@]}"; do
 
     DICT_FLAG=""
     if [[ "$target" == *ext4* ]]; then
-        DICT_FLAG="-- -dict=fuzz/dictionaries/ext4.dict"
+        DICT_FLAG="-dict=fuzz/dictionaries/ext4.dict"
     elif [[ "$target" == *btrfs* ]]; then
-        DICT_FLAG="-- -dict=fuzz/dictionaries/btrfs.dict"
+        DICT_FLAG="-dict=fuzz/dictionaries/btrfs.dict"
     fi
 
     cargo fuzz run "$target" \
         -- \
         -max_total_time="$DURATION" \
         -max_len=65536 \
+        $DICT_FLAG \
         > "$TARGET_LOG" 2>&1 || TARGET_RC=$?
 
     TARGET_END=$(date +%s)
